name: voxel-engine-kit
description: Zero-build, offline-first three.js voxel engine kit: renderer + HDR bloom pipeline, voxel meshing with baked AO, character builders, particles/smears, WebAudio synth, settings persistence, quality tiers, skybox/environment, AABB collision, and a vectorized (8-way) hitbox. A copy-and-hack starting point, not a framework.
//: three is vendored under lib/three (offline). Install it only if you want editor/tooling type resolution.
author: sumosizedginger
